root_text.an8.119:1.3: Ajjhattaṁ rūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati parittāni suvaṇṇadubbaṇṇāni,
root_text.an8.119:1.5: Ajjhattaṁ rūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati appamāṇāni suvaṇṇadubbaṇṇāni, tāni abhibhuyya ‘jānāmi passāmī’ti evaṁsaññī hoti.
root_text.an8.119:1.6: Ajjhattaṁ arūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati parittāni suvaṇṇadubbaṇṇāni, tāni abhibhuyya ‘jānāmi passāmī’ti evaṁsaññī hoti.
root_text.an8.119:1.7: Ajjhattaṁ arūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati appamāṇāni suvaṇṇadubbaṇṇāni, tāni abhibhuyya ‘jānāmi passāmī’ti evaṁsaññī hoti.
root_text.an8.119:1.8: Ajjhattaṁ arūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati nīlāni nīlavaṇṇāni nīlanidassanāni nīlanibhāsāni
root_text.an8.119:1.13: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime aṭṭha dhammā bhāvetabbā”.

translation_text.an8.119:1.1: “For insight into greed, eight things should be developed.
translation_text.an8.119:1.3: Perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, limited, both pretty and ugly.
translation_text.an8.119:1.4: Mastering them, they perceive: ‘I know and see.’
translation_text.an8.119:1.5: Perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, limitless, both pretty and ugly. …
translation_text.an8.119:1.6: Not perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, limited, both pretty and ugly. …
translation_text.an8.119:1.7: Not perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, limitless, both pretty and ugly. …
translation_text.an8.119:1.8: Not perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, blue, with blue color and blue appearance. …
translation_text.an8.119:1.11: Not perceiving form internally, they see forms externally, white, with white color and white appearance.
translation_text.an8.119:1.12: Mastering them, they perceive: ‘I know and see.’
translation_text.an8.119:1.13: For insight into greed, these eight things should be developed.”
